cause_analysis.narrative: Blow Me Away organic salon & head spa churned on 2026-04-24 after 186 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-29 via app_chat — 116 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 116 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

Subject: Make money with referrals this month!\n\nBody: Hi! Know a business owner who wants to get more clients? This month,  each referral pays $250. If someone you know runs a salon, spa, med spa, barbershop, aesthetic clinic, or wellness center, introduce us. When they join Zoca,  you get $250 in Zoca credits  — $10…

When I spoke with Bikash, I explained that our team is currently unable to properly track leads.  Based on that issue, Bikash recommended adding the AI service to support lead tracking. At that time, the agreement was as follows:

Hi Sayaka, I want to clarify that your current subscription for local SEO is $249 per month, but we can adjust it to $199 moving forward if that works for you. Please let me know, and I'll take care of the next steps!
My understanding after that conversation was that you would speak internally with your leadership team and get back to me with an alternative solution.
Phone call is difficult to me
Taking all of this into account, we are willing to continue only if SEO + AI services can be provided at $199 per month.

•	The AI service would be provided as a 30-day trial at no charge 	•	During those 30 days, we would pay $249 for SEO, while using SEO + AI together 	•	If revenue did not increase after 30 days, we could cancel 	•	If revenue increased, we would continue at $499/month (SEO + AI services)
Because of this, our team is reluctant to continue phone follow-ups, and realistically, we cannot reliably update lead statuses.
Can you text me so i can understand

Hi Sayaka, I completely understand your budget concerns, and I'm happy to confirm that we can offer the local SEO and the Discovery AI agent together for $199. Please let me know if this works for you, and I'll take care of the next steps right away!
However, this is exactly where our limitation lies. When our team follows up by phone, the majority of responses are complaints such as: 	•	“I was just browsing” 	•	“Do not call me again”
If $199 is not possible, please present the best alternative offer you are able to provide so we can make a final decision.  Thank you for your understanding.  Best regards, Sayaka
After reviewing our budget, I concluded that $499 per month is not something we can afford, which is why I submitted a cancellation request.

Additionally, Bikash explained that unless lead statuses are actively updated, it is not possible to accurately determine which SEO keywords are working. He emphasized that updating lead statuses is critical.
